---
title: "About"
# Add a headshot later: drop profile.jpg next to this file and uncomment ↓
# image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/victorborba7/f1-data-analysis
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR_PROFILE
---

I'm a data engineer / analyst exploring **Formula 1 through data**.

Every race weekend I take the live timing and telemetry from
[FastF1](https://github.com/theOehrly/Fast-F1) and turn it into a story: where the
time went, why a strategy worked, and what the numbers say that the broadcast didn't.

## What you'll find here

- **Race breakdowns** — results, lap-time evolution, tyre strategy
- **Telemetry deep-dives** — corner-by-corner delta analysis between drivers
- **Pace & degradation models** — true race pace, tyre wear regression
- **Season pipeline** — a reproducible ETL that tracks the championship as it unfolds

## Stack

`Python` · `FastF1` · `pandas` · `matplotlib` · `Plotly` · `Quarto`

All the code behind these posts lives on [GitHub](https://github.com/victorborba7/f1-data-analysis).
